title: rubus citriodorus
intro: Rubus citriodorus, also known as Lemon Rubus or Lemon Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus citriodorus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine. Rubus citriodorus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
